concerns.text: Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) referenced in plan's Constitution Check table states 'All citations are validated by the Reference-Validator' but no task implements or runs this verification. Plan element lacks task coverage.

Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth) referenced in plan's Constitution Check table states 'All figures and tables trace back to a single row in data/ and a single code block' but no task verifies this tracing. Plan element lacks task coverage.

Constitution Principle VII (Experience Stratification) referenced in plan's Constitution Check table states thresholds are 'version-controlled in code/analysis/experience.py' but T008 places them in code/config/experiment.yaml. Plan element task location mismatch.
